title: Missing DB.DBA.SPARQL_INS_OR_DEL_OR_MODIFY_CTOR_FIN permission for DELETE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ex_Title (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE ex_Feature (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title_id INT, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (title_id) REFERENCES ex_Title(id));
INSERT INTO ex_Title (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Sample Title');
INSERT INTO ex_Feature (id, title_id, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'Sample Feature');
DELETE FROM ex_Feature WHERE title_id = (SELECT id FROM ex_Title WHERE name = 'Sample Title');
key_bug_features: Missing permission for executing DELETE SPARQL command
